info.title: seazn.club platform API
info.description: Versioned REST API (design doc engine/08). Every response is `{ ok, data | error, requestId }`. Additive changes land in place; breaking changes move to /api/v2 with Sunset headers on deprecation.

apiKey.description: Pro API key: `Authorization: Bearer sk_live_…` (entitlement api.access)
